name: Grandma Rae’s Pasta e Piselli

ingredients.item: can San Marzano tomatoes plus 1 can water

method: In a large frying pan on medium heat, saute onion and red pepper flakes in 2 T olive oil for 2 minutes, add peas and mix well, add tomatoes, water, salt, pepper, and simmer for 20 minutes.

Boil a pot of salted water and add pasta. When pasta is ready, transfer directly to sauce, add pecorino, and 1-2 ladles of pasta water, mix well until a creamy sauce forms. Manticare a couple times and turn onto plates. Top with more grated pecorino. Serves 2-3. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. This is my favorite pasta recipe. They make this in Naples! Olé
